# gpmapr

This package is an R wrapper for \[<https://gpmap.opengwas.io/api>\]

## Installation

You can install the development version of gpmapr from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("MRCIEU/gpmapr")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`all_genes()`](all_genes.md) : All genes
- [`all_traits()`](all_traits.md) : All traits
- [`associations()`](associations.md) : Get Associations by SNP ID and
  Study ID
- [`gene()`](gene.md) : Gene
- [`genes()`](genes.md) : Genes
- [`get_all_gene_pleiotropies()`](get_all_gene_pleiotropies.md) : Get
  All Gene Pleiotropies
- [`get_all_variant_pleiotropies()`](get_all_variant_pleiotropies.md) :
  Get All SNP Pleiotropies
- [`get_gwas()`](get_gwas.md) : Get a GWAS from the API
- [`health_api()`](health_api.md) : Get API Health
- [`ld_matrix()`](ld_matrix.md) : LD Matrix
- [`ld_proxies()`](ld_proxies.md) : LD Proxies
- [`region()`](region.md) : Region
- [`search_gpmap()`](search_gpmap.md) : Search the Genotype-Phenotype
  Map
- [`trait()`](trait.md) : Trait
- [`traits()`](traits.md) : Traits
- [`upload_gwas()`](upload_gwas.md) : Upload a GWAS to the API
- [`variant()`](variant.md) : Variant
- [`variants()`](variants.md) : Variants
